info.title: recipes API
info.description: API specification for the recipes service

get.summary: List recipes. Public-only when not logged in or non-admin; admins see private too.

200.description: List of recipes (public only when not admin, includes private for admins).

post.summary: Create recipe (and optionally initial version). Admin only.

subtitle.description: Subtitle shown on menus and list views

description.description: Optional longer description shown on recipe detail

isPublic.description: Whether the recipe is visible to non-admin users

initialVersion.description: Optional initial version content for the first version

200.description: Created recipe and initial RecipeVersion if provided.

initialVersion.description: Present when initialVersion was supplied in the request.

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid auth headers, or not logged in.

403.description: Forbidden - user does not have required privileges (admin only).

get.summary: Get one recipe with current version, optional notes and file list.

200.description: Recipe with current version; optionally includes recent notes and file list.

notes.description: Optional list of recent recipe notes.

files.description: Optional list of recipe file info.

put.summary: Update recipe metadata only (title, descriptions, isPublic). Admin only.

schema.description: Fields to update; only provided fields are updated.

subtitle.description: Subtitle shown on menus and list views

description.description: Optional longer description shown on recipe detail

isPublic.description: Whether the recipe is visible to non-admin users

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid auth headers, or not logged in.

403.description: Forbidden - user does not have required privileges (admin only).

delete.summary: Delete recipe (and handle versions/notes/files per policy). Admin only.

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid auth headers, or not logged in.

403.description: Forbidden - user does not have required privileges (admin only).

get.summary: List version history for a recipe (ordered by createdAt).

200.description: Version history for the recipe (ordered by createdAt).

post.summary: Create a new recipe version (recorded history entry). Admin only.

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid auth headers, or not logged in.

403.description: Forbidden - user does not have required privileges (admin only).

put.summary: Update the latest version in place (no new version created). Admin only.

requestBody.description: Version content (full or partial); same shape as RecipeVersion content.

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid auth headers, or not logged in.

403.description: Forbidden - user does not have required privileges (admin only).

get.summary: List notes for a recipe (e.g. chronological).

post.summary: Create a note; optionally link to a recipe version. Admin only.

requestBody.description: Note body and optional recipe version link.

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid auth headers, or not logged in.

403.description: Forbidden - user does not have required privileges (admin only).

put.summary: Edit note; server sets everEdited. Admin only.

requestBody.description: Note body and optional recipe version link.

200.description: Updated RecipeNote (everEdited set by server when applicable).

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid auth headers, or not logged in.

403.description: Forbidden - user does not have required privileges (admin only).

delete.summary: Delete a note on a recipe. Admin only.

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid auth headers, or not logged in.

403.description: Forbidden - user does not have required privileges (admin only).

get.summary: List all files for a recipe.

post.summary: Upload a new file for a recipe (multiple files allowed). Admin only.

file.description: The file to upload (stored in Azure).

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid auth headers, or not logged in.

403.description: Forbidden - user does not have required privileges (admin only).

delete.summary: Remove one file from a recipe. Admin only.

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid auth headers, or not logged in.

403.description: Forbidden - user does not have required privileges (admin only).

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid auth headers, or not logged in.

403.description: Forbidden - user does not have required privileges.

get.summary: List all note files for a recipe (one request for the detail page).

200.description: All note files for the recipe (each item has recipeNoteId).

get.summary: List all files for a recipe note.

post.summary: Upload a new file for a recipe note (multiple files allowed). Admin only.

file.description: The file to upload (stored in Azure).

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid auth headers, or not logged in.

403.description: Forbidden - user does not have required privileges (admin only).

delete.summary: Remove one file from a recipe note. Admin only.

parameters.name: fileId
parameters.description: Recipe note file id to remove

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid auth headers, or not logged in.

403.description: Forbidden - user does not have required privileges (admin only).

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid auth headers, or not logged in.

403.description: Forbidden - user does not have required privileges.

get.summary: Search Unsplash for photos by query (e.g. recipe title). Not recipe-scoped; general Unsplash search. Used by the Unsplash picker modal.

200.description: Search results: array of Unsplash photo search items.

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid auth headers, or not logged in.

403.description: Forbidden - user does not have required privileges.

post.summary: Add a recipe file from an Unsplash photo. Backend fetches photo, tracks download, stores file and Unsplash user; returns RecipeFileInfo with unsplashAttribution when applicable.

200.description: Created recipe file metadata (includes unsplashAttribution when from Unsplash).

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid auth headers, or not logged in.

403.description: Forbidden - user does not have required privileges (admin only).

get.summary: List collections the current user is a member of (any role). Returns only collections where the user's email is in collection_member and (email is validated OR user is creator).

200.description: Collections the current user is a member of.

collections.description: List of collections the user is a member of.

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid auth headers, or not logged in.

403.description: Forbidden - user does not have required privileges.

post.summary: Create a collection. Caller becomes sole owner and creator. Id is optional (URL-safe, unique); if omitted, server generates one.

id.description: Optional id (URL-safe, unique); if omitted, server generates a short id

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid auth headers, or not logged in.

403.description: Forbidden - user does not have required privileges.

get.summary: Get one collection by id. Caller must be a member (any role) and have validated email; creator always has access.

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid auth headers, or not logged in.

403.description: Forbidden - not a member or unvalidated email (creator excepted).

404.description: Not Found - collection does not exist.

subtitle.description: Subtitle shown on menus and list views

description.description: Optional longer description shown on recipe detail (not on menu)
description.example: A crowd-pleasing recipe that works every time. Best with room-temperature butter.

isPublic.description: Whether the recipe is visible to non-admin users

updatedBy.description: User id of the last updater

updatedAt.description: When the recipe was last updated

currentVersionId.description: Optional id of the current/latest version for display

content.description: Version body — structured ingredients and markdown instructions

ingredients.description: List of ingredients; quantity and unit are strings (e.g. "2+1/3", "cups")

quantity.description: Quantity as string to support values like "1/3", "2+1/3"

instructionsMarkdown.example:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix dry ingredients...

example.instructionsMarkdown:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix dry ingredients.

id.description: Unique identifier for this recipe version

recipeId.description: Id of the recipe this version belongs to

content.description: Version body — structured ingredients and markdown instructions

ingredients.description: List of ingredients; quantity and unit are strings (e.g. "2+1/3", "cups")

quantity.description: Quantity as string to support values like "1/3", "2+1/3"

instructionsMarkdown.example:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix dry ingredients...

example.instructionsMarkdown:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix dry ingredients.

isLatest.description: Whether this version is the current one for the recipe (only one per recipe is true)

createdBy.description: User id of the creator of this version

code.description: A short, machine-readable error code, for when HTTP status codes are not sufficient.

message.description: A human-readable description of the error.
message.example: The requested resource could not be found.

recipeId.description: Id of the recipe this note belongs to

recipeVersionId.description: Optional id of the recipe version this note is linked to (e.g. when written with a change)

body.description: Note content (how it went, what to try next)
body.example: Reduced sugar by 1/4 cup; next time try brown butter.

everEdited.description: Whether the note has ever been edited after creation (set to true on first update)

updatedBy.description: User id of the last updater

updatedAt.description: When the note was last updated

body.description: Note content (how it went, what to try next)
body.example: Reduced sugar by 1/4 cup; next time try brown butter.

recipeVersionId.description: Optional id of the recipe version this note is linked to (e.g. when written with a change)

unsplash-attribution.description: Minimal fields needed to attribute an Unsplash photo: photographer and links with UTM params per Unsplash API requirements. Shown when displaying Unsplash-sourced recipe files (e.g. full-size view).

photographerProfileUrl.description: Unsplash profile URL with UTM params (utm_source, utm_medium=referral)

unsplashSourceUrl.description: Unsplash source link with UTM params for "on Unsplash" attribution

recipe-file-info.description: Metadata for one file attached to a recipe. Uses SAF file metadata (blob_name, file_original_name, mimetype, size, created_at, updated_at).

id.description: Unique identifier for the file record

recipeId.description: Id of the recipe this file is attached to

blobName.description: Storage blob name (Azure) for the file

fileOriginalName.description: Original filename as provided on upload

updatedAt.description: When the file metadata was last updated

downloadUrl.description: Full URL to download or view the file (API base + /recipes/:id/files/:fileId/blob)

unsplashAttribution.description: When present, the file was sourced from Unsplash; frontend must show attribution (e.g. full-size view). Omitted when file is from upload.

recipe-note-file-info.description: Metadata for one file attached to a recipe note. Uses SAF file metadata (blob_name, file_original_name, mimetype, size, created_at, updated_at).

id.description: Unique identifier for the file record

recipeNoteId.description: Id of the recipe note this file is attached to

blobName.description: Storage blob name (Azure) for the file

fileOriginalName.description: Original filename as provided on upload

updatedAt.description: When the file metadata was last updated

downloadUrl.description: Full URL to download or view the file (API base + /recipes/:id/notes/:noteId/files/:fileId/blob)

unsplash-photo-search-item.description: One photo returned from Unsplash search, enough to show a thumbnail and to request "add from Unsplash" later.

id.description: Unsplash photo id (short id, e.g. from generateShortId)

thumbUrl.description: URL of the thumbnail image for grid display

regularUrl.description: URL of the regular-size image (e.g. for add-from-Unsplash)

downloadLocation.description: Unsplash download tracking URL; required when adding the photo via the API

add-recipe-file-from-unsplash-request.description: Payload to add a recipe file from an Unsplash photo. Backend will fetch the photo by ID to get the user object for storage.

unsplashPhotoId.description: Unsplash photo id (short id) of the chosen photo

downloadLocation.description: Unsplash download tracking URL; backend calls trackDownload with this

imageUrl.description: URL to fetch image bytes (e.g. regular or full size from search result)

id.description: Unique identifier; user-specified (URL-safe) on create or server-generated short id

createdBy.description: User id of the collection creator (short id)

updatedAt.description: When the collection was last updated

client.description: The frontend client that triggered the event. For web, it should be "web-{spa-name}".

view.description: The page that triggered the event. For vue, it should be the route name provided by vue router.

component.description: The component that triggered the event. For vue, it should be the component name.

id.description: Unique identifier for the member record (short id)

collectionId.description: Id of the collection this member belongs to

email.description: Member's email address; must be validated for access (except creator)

role.description: Member's role in the collection; creator is always owner and cannot be demoted

isCreator.description: True if this member created the collection; permanent owner, cannot be removed or demoted

createdAt.description: When the member was added to the collection
